chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-31 of 2026 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA No.106/2026 3.For hearing of main case 13.01.2026 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rehan Kayani, Advocate for the respondent No.4 Mr. Dhani Bux Lashari, Advocate for SBCA. Mr. Mehran Khan, AAG. ------------------------- This is a matter of an illegal use of property bearing plot No. 15/172, Block-3, Bihar Muslim Cooperative Housing Society, Bahadurabad, Karachi. At the very outset, both the parties state that the matter is pending before the competent authority of SBCA for a decision on 15.01.2026. If this is a position of the case, this petition is disposed of with the directions to decide the issue between the parties within two weeks, after hearing the parties concerned and pass a speaking order. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
